description: Daily price/value series for a single instrument over one calendar year.

main.description: One year of daily OHLCV bars or rate observations for a single symbol. Record key is '{symbol}:{year}' (e.g., 'AAPL:2024', 'DGS10:2024', 'CL-F:2024'). Prices are stored as integers scaled by priceScale (default 10000).

symbol.description: Ticker symbol or series identifier (e.g., AAPL, DGS10, CL-F)

name.description: Human-readable name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.', '10-Year Treasury Constant Maturity')

priceScale.description: Divisor for o/h/l/c values to recover decimal prices. Default 10000.

bars.description: Daily observations, chronologically ordered. Max 366 entries (leap year).

exchange.description: Exchange or market (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ, COMEX, FRED)

adjusted.description: Whether prices are adjusted for splits and dividends

bar.description: A single daily observation. For equities/commodities: OHLCV. For rates/spreads: just 'c' (value). All price fields (o/h/l/c) are integers scaled by the record's priceScale (default 10000).

o.description: Open price (scaled integer, divide by priceScale)

h.description: High price (scaled integer, divide by priceScale)

l.description: Low price (scaled integer, divide by priceScale)

c.description: Close price or rate value (scaled integer, divide by priceScale)
